notes: The pantheon checkout does not contain an execute-plans/ directory.
The sibling execute-plans checkout exposes the seed accessor at src/lib/bff-v1/seed.ts; src/lib/bff/client.ts and src/lib/bff-v1/legacy.ts bridge the current live/mock surfaces.

category_definitions.live_required: Operator-facing data or command/session surface that must use a live BFF route in live/strict mode. Mock seed is allowed only in mock mode or explicit hybrid fallback with visible status.
category_definitions.mock_only_dev: Development-only helper. In live mode it should be hidden, disabled, or rendered as an explicit empty/mock state; it must not masquerade as live data.
category_definitions.deprecated: Legacy public accessor that should be replaced by the typed live surface or command client and removed from seed.ts after the migration task lands.
category_definitions.deferred: No safe direct live replacement. In strict live the helper must be hidden, disabled, or return an explicit empty/unavailable state unless a later task adds a canonical BFF route or parent DTO.

helpers.name: bff.getAcceptLanguage
helpers.replacement: Use request headers from the real bffFetch/client path; keep this only as Settings/test instrumentation.
helpers.notes: Utility, not entity seed data.

helpers.name: bff.mutations
helpers.replacement: Use bffWrites/runActionSafe command-client paths and retire direct bff.mutations callers.
helpers.notes: Direct legacy mutation namespace mutates in-process mock state.

helpers.name: bff.agora
helpers.replacement: Keep bffAgora strict live adapter; ensure all exposed Agora pages consume typed live errors in strict mode.
helpers.notes: Namespace is already attached through a live adapter, but its mock branch still derives from seed for mock mode.

helpers.name: bff.v5
helpers.replacement: Keep bffV5 strict live adapter and finish v5 detail evidence.
helpers.notes: v5 write helpers still use guarded overlays or command routes; read helpers must not silently seed in strict live.

helpers.name: bff.me.get
helpers.replacement: Use /bff/me as session authority; mockMe only belongs to mock mode.
helpers.notes: Role vocabulary must align with backend canonical roles.

helpers.name: bff.me.refresh
helpers.replacement: Use live session refresh and typed BffError in strict mode.
helpers.notes: Cookie-only sessions are covered by the write-gate follow-up.

helpers.name: bff.me.logout
helpers.replacement: Use live logout; mock branch only clears local session cache in mock mode.
helpers.notes: Session lifecycle surface.

helpers.name: bff.me.invalidate
helpers.replacement: Keep as local cache invalidation used by the live /bff/me facade.
helpers.notes: Non-fetch cache helper; not seed data.

helpers.name: bff.commands.requestConfirmToken
helpers.replacement: Use bffWrites.requestConfirmToken or the command client; keep only as mock branch until command migration completes.
helpers.notes: No direct callers were found outside the write facade/tests.

elimination_order.reason: These can mislead operators or touch command/session/security surfaces.
